title: sterculia zeylanica
intro: Sterculia zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon sterculia or Ceylon chestnut, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain sterculia gum, a complex polysaccharide that has been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Sterculia zeylanica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower cholesterol levels, making it a valuable treatment for conditions such as constipation, diarrhea, and high blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Sterculia zeylanica can be made into capsules, tablets, or teas, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
